hero.headline:
Your Dream Landscape Designed &
Built to Last
hero.subheadline: Your outdoor space should be the best part of coming home. With over 30 years of expertise and 3D design technology, Emerald Gardens transforms ordinary yards into extraordinary landscapes -- so you can enjoy every moment outside.

services.label: What We Do
services.headline: Full-Service Landscaping That<br class="hidden md:block"> Transforms Your Property
services.subtitle: From design to installation to ongoing care, Emerald Gardens handles every detail so you get the outdoor space you have always wanted without the stress.

cards.title: Landscape Design
cards.description: Free onsite consultations with state-of-the-art 2D and 3D design technology. We create color renderings and detailed proposals tailored to your vision and budget.

cards.title: Landscape Installation
cards.description: Complete outdoor transformations including plantings, hardscapes, grading, and drainage solutions for residential and commercial properties across Southeast Louisiana.

cards.title: Night Lighting
cards.description: Professional outdoor lighting design and installation that enhances curb appeal, safety, and ambiance throughout your landscape year-round.

cards.title: Irrigation Systems
cards.description: Custom irrigation system design, installation, and maintenance to keep your landscape healthy and thriving through every Louisiana season.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Living
cards.description: Custom-designed outdoor kitchens, pergolas, decks, and arbors that extend your living space and create the perfect setting for entertaining.

cards.title: Lawn Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive maintenance programs including mowing, edging, mulching, pruning, seasonal flowers, fertilization, and weed control to keep your landscape pristine.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Landscape

steps.title: Free Onsite Consultation
steps.description: We visit your property, listen to your vision, and assess the space. Using our 3D design technology, we show you exactly what your new landscape will look like before any work begins.

steps.title: Expert Design & Installation
steps.description: Our licensed horticulturists and landscape contractors bring your vision to life with expert plant selection, precision grading, and quality craftsmanship on every detail.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Outdoor Oasis
steps.description: Your landscape is complete and stunning. Choose ongoing maintenance to keep it looking its best, or simply relax and enjoy every season in your transformed outdoor space.

about.label: Why Homeowners Choose Us
about.headline: 30+ Years of Turning Yards Into Living Spaces
about.description: Founded in 1995, Emerald Gardens is a family-run landscape firm serving Baton Rouge, New Orleans, and all of Southeast Louisiana. Owner Ricky Roth personally oversees every project, building one-on-one relationships with each client rather than chasing volume. Our licensed horticulturists bring superior plant knowledge, and our 3D design technology lets you see your finished landscape before a single shovel hits the ground.

features.title: Licensed & Certified Professionals
features.description: Louisiana Licensed Landscape Contractor, Horticulturist, Chemical Applicator, and General Contractor. Every credential your project demands.

features.title: 3D Design Technology
features.description: See your finished landscape before installation begins. Our state-of-the-art design tools eliminate guesswork and ensure you love the result.

features.title: Personalized Client Relationships
features.description: We focus on quality over quantity. Every client gets one-on-one attention from consultation through completion and beyond.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every proposal is detailed and itemized. You know exactly what you are getting and what it costs -- before any work begins.

guarantee.headline: Our "Landscape for Life" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any plant we install does not thrive within the warranty period, we replace it at no charge. We stand behind our work because we choose every plant, material, and technique with long-term success in mind. Your satisfaction is not negotiable -- it is the foundation of our 30-year reputation.

faqs.question: How does the design process work?
faqs.answer: It starts with a free onsite consultation where we listen to your ideas, assess your property, and discuss your budget. We then create detailed 2D and 3D renderings so you can visualize the finished landscape before we begin. The entire process is collaborative and tailored to you.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Baton Rouge, New Orleans, Gonzales, and the greater Southeast Louisiana region. We have been serving this area for over 30 years, so we know the local soil, climate, and plant varieties that thrive here.

faqs.question: Are your contractors licensed?
faqs.answer: Yes. Emerald Gardens holds a Louisiana Licensed Landscape Contractor license, Licensed Horticulturist certification, Licensed Chemical Applicator certification, and a Louisiana General Contractor license. We carry full insurance on every project.

faqs.question: Do you offer ongoing maintenance?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer comprehensive maintenance programs including mowing, edging, mulching, pruning, seasonal flower rotations, fertilization, and insect and weed control. Many of our installation clients choose ongoing care to protect their investment.

faqs.question: How long does a typical project take?
faqs.answer: It depends on scope. A simple landscape refresh might take a few days, while a full property transformation with hardscapes and outdoor kitchens can take several weeks. We provide a clear timeline during the design phase so you always know what to expect.

testimonials.name: Michael M.
testimonials.text: We've worked with Emerald Gardens for nearly a year. From the initial landscaping of our new home, as well as weekly maintenance, these are good people. The yard is wonderful, and the management keeps its promises and backs its work.

testimonials.name: Kevin C.
testimonials.text: I have dealt with many landscaping companies in my lifetime. I can say with 100% assurance that Ricky has been by far the best. He's professional, listens, very friendly and most of all a great communicator. Outstanding service!

testimonials.name: Chris F.
testimonials.text: He is very talented, very dependable, a great problem solver with good designs. His knowledge of horticulture is superior to most Landscape Architects. Highly recommended!

contact.headline:
Ready for a Landscape You
Actually Love?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure consultation and see your new landscape in 3D before any work begins. No contracts, no commitments -- just honest expertise from a team that has been doing this for 30+ years.

footer.description: Full-service landscape design, installation & maintenance. Serving Southeast Louisiana since 1995.
